title: hotbarLock
description: This mod adds a locking feature to hotbar slots
body:
# HotbarLock

**HotbarLock** is a lightweight, fully client-side Fabric mod that lets you lock individual hotbar slots to prevent accidental item movement.

## Features

- **Lock any hotbar slot (1–9)** — locked slots cannot be clicked, swapped, or modified from the inventory
- **Offhand swap protection** — pressing your swap-to-offhand key on a locked slot does nothing
- **In-game overlay GUI** — a small draggable window in your inventory screen with checkboxes for each slot
- **Hideable UI** — the window is hidden by default, press `0` to toggle it (rebindable inside the window)
- **Persistent config** — your locked slots and hotkey are saved between sessions, worlds, and servers
- **100% client-side** — no server-side installation required, works on any server

## How to Use

1. Open your inventory
2. Press `0` to show the HotbarLock window
3. Check the slots you want to lock
4. That's it — those slots are now protected

## Dependencies

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)


### If you like this mod, I'd really appreciate if you could star the GitHub repository. Thank you!
